evals.prompt: Seasonally adjust this monthly CPI series using X-13.
evals.expected_output: Skill fires; runs X-13ARIMA-SEATS via the locally installed x13as.exe and writes a seasonally-adjusted CSV.

assertions.name: Applies X13 seasonal adjustment on explicit request

evals.prompt: Seasonally adjust this series that only has 18 months of monthly data.
evals.expected_output: Skill reports a clear prerequisite error (needs at least 3 years / 36 periods) rather than silently producing bad output or a raw traceback.

assertions.name: Validates minimum history length before running X13
